sglang.title: [FP8 KV Cache] Avoid KeyError at loading pre-quantized FP8 model with kv_scale
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Reuse some FP8 quantized models, just skip/ignore kv_scale for now.
E.g. amd/Meta-Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-FP8-KV has kv_scale embedded, enable following command to ignore them for now.
python -m sglang.bench_latency --model amd/Meta-Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-FP8-KV --tp 8 --batch-size 32 --

sglang.title: Organize sampling batch info better
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Put necessary fields in the SamplingBatchInfo in the beginning.
Use write as the only interface to update ReqToTokenPool.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Enforce Mistral ToolCall id constraint when using the Mistral tool call parser
vllm.author: gcalmettes
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR introduces a dedicated MistralToolCall object (directly inheriting from ToolCall) to enforce the random alphanumeric string of size 9 to be used for tool calls parsed with Mistral tool call parser.
FIX #9019

vllm.title: [Core] Make BlockSpaceManagerV2 the default BlockManager to use.
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We plan to deprecate BlockManager V1 in favor of BlockManager V2. As part of that deprecation process we want to make BlockSpaceManager V2 the default. In this pr we make BlockSpaceManagerV2 the default instead of BlockSpaceManagerV1. Those who want to use BlockSpaceManagerV1 can still use it by set

vllm.title: [Frontend] [Neuron] Parse literals out of override-neuron-config
vllm.author: xendo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
For now it was only possible to add string parameters, if a bool or a number was passed, the neuron initialization failed. The parsing was also inconsistent with how other composite configs were passed (see --mm-processor-kwargs).
This is not a backward compatible change, but considering that --over

vllm.title: Fix failing spec decode test
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Force the test to run with BlockManagerV1 and verify that it fails since Spec Decode doesn't support BlockManagerV1

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Weight loading fix for OPT model
vllm.author: domenVres
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes weight loading for versions of OPT models that does not have tied embedding and lm_head weights. One such example is: https://huggingface.co/cjvt/OPT_GaMS-1B

vllm.title: [Frontend][Feature] support tool calling for internlm/internlm2_5-7b-chat model
vllm.author: sydnash
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
support tool calling for internlm/internlm2_5-7b-chat model
add ToolParserManager to manage the tool parsers
add a command line which used to specific a customize tool parser which can be used in the --tool-call-parser
add a parallel test skip config for models which dose not support parallel tool c

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Per file CUDA Archs (improve wheel size and dev build times)
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Improve dev build times and reduce wheel size by setting which compute capabilities we compile for on a per file basis instead of globally.
Also moved some of the torch library impl registrations into associated files (out of torch_bindings.cpp) this allows us to completely leave the implementation

vllm.title: [Misc] Enable multi-step output streaming by default
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I think we should consider enabling it by default for the so we have good ITL metrics with multi-step. There is a small performance penalty of ~7% in the PR that implemented this #8335, but we still have the flag in place to disable if needed, using --multi-step-stream-outputs=False.

vllm.title: [Models] Add remaining model PP support
vllm.author: andoorve
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add all other possible models for PP
FIX #7684
FIX #8923
